data.title: M EVO Global Acquisition Corp II prices $270M IPO at $10 per unit
data.description:
• Blank-check SPAC M EVO Global Acquisition Corp II (MEVO) priced an upsized $270M IPO consisting of 27M units at $10 each.
  • The offering was upsized from the original offering size of 22.5M units.
  • The units start trading on Nasdaq as "MEVOU" from January 30, 2026.
  • Each unit includes one Class A ordinary share and half a redeemable warrant, exercisable at $11.50 per share. Separate trading for shares ("MEVOX") and warrants ("MEVOW") will follow later.
  • The offering is expected to close on February 2, 2026.

data.title: Nomura Holdings GAAP EPS of ¥94.67, revenue of ¥1590.53B
data.description:
• Nomura Holdings press release (NMR): for the nine months ended GAAP EPS of ¥94.67.
  • Revenue of ¥1590.53B (+10.5% Y/Y).
  • Earnings Forecasts for the year ending March 31, 2026: Nomura provides investment, financing and related services in the capital markets on a global basis. In the global capital markets there exist uncertainties due to, but not limited to, economic and market conditions. Nomura, therefore, does not present earnings forecasts.

data.title: 5E Advanced Materials prices $36M upsized offering
data.description:
• 5E Advanced Materials (FEAM), ASX: 5EA) priced an upsized and oversubscribed public offering of 18M common shares at $2.00 per share.
  • The gross proceeds are expected to be ~$36M.
  • The net proceeds, together with its existing cash, cash equivalents and marketable securities, are expected to be used for the operation of its small-scale boron facility, wellfield development and finalization of our commercial mine plan, FEED engineering, and general corporate purposes.
  • The offering is expected to close on February 2, 2026.
  • The stock price dropped 1.4% on Friday during pre-market trade.

data.title: ICE futures and options touch record open interest, up 20% Y/Y
data.description:
• Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) announced a milestone in its futures and options markets, with January 26 record open interest exceeding 114M contracts across its global futures and options markets, up about 20% Y/Y.
  • Global commodities futures and options hit a record 72M contracts in open interest, up 8% Y/Y, driven by energy at 68.4M contracts.
  • Oil futures and options reached 18.6M contracts (up 17% Y/Y), with ICE Brent at a record 7.5M (up 27% Y/Y).
  • EU natural gas futures and options saw 6.3M contracts, including a TTF record of 5.8M, both up 20% Y/Y.​

data.title: France GDP growth slows in Q4
data.description:
• France GDP slowed down in Q4 2025, increasing by 0.2% after a 0.5% rise in Q3, flash estimates showed.
  • Final domestic demand (excluding inventories) slowed slightly: gross fixed capital formation decelerated (+0.2% after +0.7%), but household consumption accelerated moderately (+0.3% after +0.1%).
  • Overall, domestic demand (excluding inventories) contributed positively to GDP growth this quarter: +0.3 percentage points after +0.4 percentage points in Q3.
  • On average over the year 2025, GDP increases by 0.9% (after +1.1% in 2024 and +1.6% in 2023).

data.title: Billerud AB Non-GAAP EPS of SEK 0.13, revenue of SEK 9.24B; initiates Q1 outlook
data.description:
• Billerud AB (publ) press release (BLRDY): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of SEK 0.13.
  • Revenue of SEK 9.24B (-19.4% Y/Y).
  • The Board of Directors proposes a dividend of SEK 2.00 per share (3.50).
  • Adjusted EBITDA SEK 818 million. Adjusted EBITDA margin  9%.
  • Outlook for Q1: Sustained solid performance in North America • Continued weak market conditions in Europe and Asia with negative pricing impact • Lower pulpwood costs • Loss of free emission rights and sequentially higher planned maintenance costs.

data.title: Kyivstar Group prices secondary offering at $10.50 per share
Anfield Energy amends credit facility
data.description:
• Anfield Energy (AEC) amended its credit facility agreement with Extract Advisors to support a key acquisition.
  • The company has agreed to issue 50,000 bonus common shares and 500,000 bonus common share purchase warrants at an exercise price of C$12.50 per share.
  • The issuance of the bonus shares and bonus warrants is subject to the approval of the TSXV.

data.title: Sky Harbour Group prices Series 2026 bonds at 6%
data.description:
• Sky Harbour Group (SKYH) priced Series 2026 Aviation Facilities Project bonds at a yield of 6.0%.
  • The deal was upsized from the original $100M to $150M given investor demand.
  • The Series 2026 Bonds were priced at par, carry a 6.0% coupon, and benefit from a mandatory tender on January 1, 2031.
  • The Series 2026 Bonds are proposed to be issued by the Public Finance Authority of Wisconsin, a multi-jurisdictional conduit issuer. 
  • The Series 2026 Bonds are expected to be issued on or about February 12, 2026.
  • The stock price traded 2% higher on Thursday during after-market hours of trading.

data.title: Komatsu reports results for the nine-month period; reaffirms FY outlook
data.description:
• Komatsu press release (KMTUY): for the nine-month period (April 1- December 31, 2025) of the fiscal year ending March 31, 2026, consolidated net sales totaled JPY 2,915.5 billion, a decrease of 1.4% from the corresponding period a year ago.
  • Net income attributable to Komatsu Ltd. decreased by 13.0% from the corresponding period a year ago to JPY 269.8 billion.
  • Projection for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2026（FY2025）Komatsu makes no change in the projection of October 29, 2025, concerning consolidated business results for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2026.
